data.content: Planning update complete for 7f74. The implementation should split `FinalCutView` into Human Action/Notes Work and Approvals tabs, reuse `approval-request-visibility` extraction, add a pending approval model/store with dedupe, extend notification store entries with href/dedupe support, route bell/banner/toast to `/beats?view=finalcut&tab=approvals`, and add structured logs for detection, persistence/notification, duplicate suppression, unsupported/manual actions, and resolution. Preserve existing BeatTable behavior for the human-owned Escalations view. Implement in a dedicated worktree and run lint, typecheck, test, and build.
